hardness_axes.name: Discover
hardness_axes.reasoning: Solver must read split encode/decode/enforce modules, CLI transcripts, and cross-format fixtures to learn which authority surface is authoritative after restarts.

hardness_axes.name: Synthesize
hardness_axes.reasoning: Correct behavior requires coordinating rollback generation tags, canonical artifact selection, and downstream bind invariants across JSON, TOML, and sealed byte records.

hardness_axes.name: Diagnose or Design/Search
hardness_axes.reasoning: Reverse-engineering shape with constraint-complete public targets; agents infer enforcement paths from behavior without a named patch recipe.

hardness_axes.name: Navigate coupling
hardness_axes.reasoning: Local fixes to one authority path break freshness linkage, principal transitions, or rollback manifest alignment tested in later waves.

hardness_axes.name: Reason beyond training
hardness_axes.reasoning: Combines policy reconciliation, split trust boundaries, and replay semantics beyond a single textbook ACL check or regex guard.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Disclosure-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: After digest and freshness rules are disclosed, work remains integrating three authorities and replay ordering, not transcribing one table.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hidden-instance
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Failure is behavioral across scenarios, not identifying one corrupt file among hundreds.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Single-artifact repair
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Editing only the output trace or one manifest without source changes fails multi-wave and cross-format tests.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Generalization
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Verifier spans multiple replay orderings, restart boundaries, and principal revocation cases.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Prompt-honesty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Honest constraint-complete prose names outcomes and commands but not which module mis-selects canonical surfaces.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Cheating-vs-difficulty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Regeneration deletes and provenance checks are standard fairness, not the core difficulty source.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Mechanical-fix filter
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Issue is authority reconciliation semantics, not timeouts or dependency pins.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Localized-fix
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Three module roots on distinct package paths participate in the flipping contract.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Oracle-locality
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Planned oracle coordinates behavioral edits across rollback, selector, and bind modules.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Small declarative-cluster
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: No tiny policy table alone captures the fix; procedural flows across authorities interact.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Grep-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Instruction nouns are banned on fix-path symbols; neutral rx/vx/wx package tokens avoid domain grep to one file.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Pre-factored-helper
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: No helper named validate_policy or reconcile_archive maps 1:1 to prompt bullets.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Recipe-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Not a textbook jail hardening or HMAC recipe; requires runtime-specific authority inference.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Security-aura discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Residual hardness is cross-authority reconciliation and false-green durability, not security vocabulary alone.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Orthogonal-checklist
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Rollback tagging constrains which envelope the selector may trust and what bind must preserve across phases.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Harness-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Single-container Docker is isolation only; difficulty lives in code coupling.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: One-pass solvability
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Agents must run scripted sequences, compare observation records, and revise hypotheses across restarts.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hard-only gate
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Matches professional policy-engine incident work, not an undergrad checklist exercise.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Discovery/design budget test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Discovery budget lists three non-trivial obligations living in environment code paths.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Instruction specificity test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Non-repair reverse_engineering uses constraint-complete public contract; construction recipe stays hidden.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Topology distribution test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Three implementation topologies each require three coordinated loci; no single locus suffices for all tests.

rubric_axes.name: Verifiable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Deterministic pytest over regenerated audit traces, derived digests, and cross-run principal transitions.

rubric_axes.name: Well-specified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Public contract anchors on commands, trace schema, and documented freshness linkage without naming patch sites.

rubric_axes.name: Solvable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Expert human can complete within hours given codebase and audit_contract.md.

rubric_axes.name: Difficult
rubric_axes.reasoning: Split authorities plus false-green intermediate states exceed undergrad scope after honest disclosure.

rubric_axes.name: Interesting
rubric_axes.reasoning: Mirrors paid work on hardened archive gateways and policy reconciliation after checkpointed replays.

rubric_axes.name: Outcome-verified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Grades regenerated observation records, not narrated repair steps or tool choices.

instruction_completeness_test.reasoning: instruction.md states outcomes, commands, and schema homes, but choosing canonical surfaces and sequencing rollback binds requires reading code and running ark_run scenarios.

discovery_budget.discovery: Stale generation counters survive a single process restart while health summaries already report allowed transitions.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Naming the stale counter location collapses search to one grep hit for generation state.

discovery_budget.discovery: Which of the live catalog rows, sealed envelope index, or rollback manifest is authoritative when each surface is locally self-consistent.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Stating the canonical surface removes the authority-split inference burden.

discovery_budget.discovery: How bind logic must preserve downstream freshness and principal-transition invariants across coupled replay and rollback phases without clobbering durable seals.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: A bind-only recipe invites a one-module patch that fails restart-boundary tests.

instruction_specificity.reasoning: Public instruction names CLI, trace path, principal/freshness obligations, and schema homes; it does not reveal which authority module is wrong or patch order.

attack_path.summary: Grepping instruction nouns on fix symbols is blocked; trusting health summaries alone fails late-wave linkage; static JSON fails regeneration traps.
attack_path.reasoning: Each shortcut leaves at least one flipping-contract test red while others may briefly pass.

smallest_plausible_patch.summary: Requires aligning rollback generation persistence, canonical selector inputs, and cross-phase bind rules together.
smallest_plausible_patch.reasoning: Smallest honest English description spans three behavioral roots, not one permission bit or regex.

collapse_audit.reasoning: Post-disclosure residual requires reasoning about which authority feeds the verifier under replay, not mapping each public rule to one obvious function after formulas are visible in audit_contract.md.
collapse_audit.residual_hardness: Even knowing digest linkage formulas, the solver must decide when health summaries may diverge from durable seals and how rollback phases reorder generation markers.
red_flags: avoid naming authoritative artifact path in instruction
watch summary-only tests without envelope provenance

topology_enumeration.summary: Correct rollback generation tagging first, then retarget selector inputs, then align bind invariants.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Rollback-only fixes leave selector trusting the wrong catalog; selector-only fixes leave stale generation after restart; bind-only fixes cannot choose legal envelopes.

topology_enumeration.summary: Establish canonical surface selection first, then fix generation persistence, then propagate bind rules.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Selector fixes without rollback still emit stale generation after restart; bind updates without rollback ordering still break rollback-phase tests.

topology_enumeration.summary: Repair cross-phase bind invariants first and backtrack to selector precedence and rollback counters.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Bind cannot fix canonical choice if selector remains biased; rollback timing still poisons generation markers without rx changes.

symbol_table.purpose: Tracks generation markers across replay and rollback segments for downstream readers.
Chooses reconciler inputs among catalog, envelope index, and manifest views.
Materializes externally visible digest rows and principal transition records.

decoy_manifest.non_fix_purpose: Optional clip helper for diagnostics-only replay slices.
Maintains a historical side index not used for live canonical selection.

renames_during_drafting.reason: Original name embedded audit, restart, and generation instruction nouns.

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: ark_run scenario flags control restart injection and rollback phase ordering documented in audit_contract.md
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: models assume generic CLI success codes imply durable reconciliation
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: flag meanings and scenario matrix are fully documented locally

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: JSON audit traces, TOML bundles, and sealed byte envelopes must agree on digest linkage
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: editing one format leaves orphans that still pass shallow checks
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: cross-format rules are in audit_contract.md with worked examples

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: early waves show allowed health summaries while durable seals and later-wave linkages disagree
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: agents stop after first green health summary without chaining reruns
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: failing behavior visible through documented command and trace fields

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: rollback phases require idempotent merges without clobbering durable seals or principal transitions
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: shortcut flush fixes one rerun but breaks another rollback scenario

calibration_plan.human_sanity: Expert can trace three roots using audit traces and audit_contract.md within a few hours
calibration_plan.shortcut_audit: watch for static JSON writes, digest hardcoding, test edits, NOP oracle gaming
calibration_plan.ablation_plan: drop rollback fix alone, drop selector fix alone, drop bind fix alone to show partial failures

pass_rate_target.basis: stronger target agent on identical Harbor harness

metrics.criterion: trace digests and principal transitions match regenerated derivations from public rules
cross-wave freshness and generation invariants hold under reruns and rollback
no stale catalog fields after rollback completes
ark_run CLI and paths behave as documented across scenarios
all required trace sections populated without hand edits

verifier_scoring_plan.binary_threshold_rule: reward.txt equals 1 only when every weighted semantic check passes in test_outputs.py

subtype_milestone_plan.sequential_dependency: single-step task; ordering expressed via stateful command sequences inside tests
subtype_milestone_plan.sidecar_or_protocol_notes: all fixtures and traces are local; single-container only; no network fetch

task_files.role: normalizes run records for audit traces
fix-frontier generation tracking across replay boundaries
fix-frontier digest and principal transition emission
shared value objects for principals and seals
solver-visible trace schema, digest rules, CLI semantics

fix_frontier.distribution: one module each under environment/rx, environment/vx, and environment/wx
fix_frontier.naming_policy: opaque fix-path symbols per construction manifest; neutral rx/vx/wx package directories
fix_frontier.helpers_policy: decoy modules perform plausible sibling work; fix-path symbols remain thin

forbidden_assertion_styles: tests that only assert JSON presence

task_shape.hardness_source: semantic inference across split encode/decode/enforce authorities with false-green durability
task_shape.collapse_risk: leaking replay ordering bug or authoritative artifact path collapses to one-file repair

category_profile.allowed_instruction_disclosures: assets, principals, allowed/denied outcomes, audit trace command and path, authority boundary description, externally tested freshness and digest linkage summarized without patch hints
category_profile.forbidden_instruction_leaks: vulnerable sink location, trust-boundary implementation file, exploit primitive, patch rule, sanitizer name, exact guard function, or which surface is canonical by default
category_profile.category_specific_hardness_bar: encode/decode/enforce authorities must reconcile under changing principals, freshness, and revocation across replay boundaries
category_profile.category_specific_verifier_risks: toy checklist, blocklist bypass, one exploit-string test, process-only assertions without durable seal checks
category_profile.coverage_role: Adds security_authority_split coverage with policy reconciliation and reverse_engineering shape distinct from config_policy_precedence references

satisfiability_risk.rc2_planned_name_risk: medium: neutral rx/vx/wx roots with decoys; instruction uses standard security vocabulary kept off fix path
satisfiability_risk.gx9_contract_risk: low: instruction discloses schema and derivation rules, not per-row expected literals
satisfiability_risk.cr1_symbol_frontier_risk: medium: three thin fix symbols with co-resident helpers listed in task_files
satisfiability_risk.hidden_contract_risk: low: verifier command, regeneration rule, and digest formulas planned in audit_contract.md and instruction summary

actionability_plan.verifier_command_visible: instruction.md names /app/bin/ark_run, /app/output/audit_trace.json, and pytest entry via tests/test.sh
actionability_plan.source_fix_intent_visible: instruction.md requires repairing /app/environment so the normal pipeline regenerates the trace
actionability_plan.generated_output_rule_visible: instruction.md states tests delete audit_trace.json and rerun generation across restart and rollback scenarios
actionability_plan.exact_formula_home: digest linkage, freshness token binding, and generation count rules in environment/app/docs/audit_contract.md mirrored at high level in instruction.md
actionability_plan.schema_home: audit trace top-level shape (runs, waves, principal_transitions, digest_records) in audit_contract.md

waiver_plan.waiver_rationale: Design stays within standard collapse, actionability, and output-contract policy without checker false positives.

realism_source.evidence_basis: Minimized from operator incidents on hardened archive gateways where health probes green early while sealed generation state and audit digests diverge after checkpointed replays
realism_source.upstream_or_synthetic_rationale: Pattern matches internal postmortems on split authority stores in policy engines; local fixtures replace proprietary payloads
realism_source.minimization_preserves: False-green intermediate states, stale generation across one restart, conflicting artifact surfaces, and rollback/replay coupled invariants
realism_source.synthetic_exception_review: Not a synthetic_exception; real_system minimization with documented causal structure
